hero.title: End-to-end business automation
hero.subtitle: ERP/CRM systems, Telegram bots and AI integrations for retail, logistics and manufacturing. From requirements to a working solution.

about.title: About me
about.text: Freelance developer based in Uzbekistan, specializing in business process automation: ERP/CRM systems, Telegram bots, AI integration and custom software development. I work with retail, logistics, garment manufacturing and hospitality businesses.
about.approach: My approach: first, clear technical specification and architecture; then development with regular progress updates; and finally, delivery with post-launch support.

erp.title: ERP/CRM systems
erp.text: Warehouse, production and order management; barcodes/QR, label printing.

bots.title: Telegram bots
bots.text: Sales, delivery, digital memberships, encrypted communication channels.

ai.title: AI integrations
ai.text: Document processing automation, smart data parsing, AI-generated reports.

warehouse-system.title: Warehouse Management System for Apparel Production
warehouse-system.description: Inventory tracking of fabrics and components. QR/barcode scanning, Cyrillic label printing, and automated low-stock notifications.
warehouse-system.task: Inventory tracking of raw materials and components in garment production. Manual tracking led to discrepancies.
warehouse-system.solution: Web-based system with barcode/QR scanning, label printing (Cyrillic-supported), and automated low-stock notifications.

pots-tracking.title: POTS — Production Order Tracking System
pots-tracking.description: Workflow control from order to shipment for 'Rangkhona' garment manufacturing. Kanban board, Telegram notifications, and smart Excel import with photo auto-mapping.
pots-tracking.task: Production stage monitoring (from order placement to shipping) at 'Rangkhona' garment company.
pots-tracking.solution: Full-featured workflow system with Kanban board, Telegram notification bot, and smart Excel order parser with automated photo lookup by SKU.

minipos-pro.title: MiniPOS Pro
minipos-pro.description: Cloud-based retail POS automation tailored for garment stores.
minipos-pro.task: Retail point-of-sale automation for apparel stores.
minipos-pro.solution: Cloud-based POS system customized for textile retail business requirements.

chz-labels.title: chz_labels — Compliance Labeling System
chz-labels.description: Web app for generating 300 DPI PDF labels with EAN-13 and DataMatrix barcodes. Includes live visual template editor.
chz-labels.task: Manual compliance label generation was time-consuming and error-prone.
chz-labels.solution: Web application for generating 300 DPI PDF labels with EAN-13 and DataMatrix barcodes, featuring a visual template layout editor.

gym-bot.title: Telegram Bot for Fitness Club
gym-bot.description: Digital membership passes with QR check-in system. Bilingual user interface (RU/UZ).
gym-bot.task: Transition from paper memberships to digital format with visit tracking.
gym-bot.solution: Telegram bot with QR codes for fast attendance logging and a bilingual interface (RU/UZ).

zerotrace-bot.title: ZeroTrace — Encrypted Messaging Bot
zerotrace-bot.description: FSM-based Telegram bot for secure messaging using AES-256-GCM encryption.
zerotrace-bot.task: Secure instant communication channel for sensitive information.
zerotrace-bot.solution: Telegram bot featuring AES-256-GCM message encryption, designed utilizing Finite State Machines (FSM).

bellissimo-bot.title: Bellissimo — Food Delivery Bot
bellissimo-bot.description: Telegram delivery bot featuring a catalog, shopping cart, and order alerts.
bellissimo-bot.task: Automating food delivery order intake via Telegram.
bellissimo-bot.solution: Telegram bot with item catalog, checkout process, and order notification alerts.
bellissimo-bot.result: Author's first commercial project, built with a formal contract and specification.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Ready to discuss your project — message me on Telegram, it's the fastest way to reach me.
